name: rate_type_backwards_compatibility
description: Verify that existing queries without rate_type_match_column_params produce identical SQL (no behavior change)
expected_query: with "t87f08681444df16bfed2380027858a10" as (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "tcf08ec602afa51cfb8dcd63813c2a2f3" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", CAST(tcf08ec602afa51cfb8dcd63813c2a2f3.trg_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t87f08681444df16bfed2380027858a10.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t87f08681444df16bfed2380027858a10" on "t87f08681444df16bfed2380027858a10"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tcf08ec602afa51cfb8dcd63813c2a2f3" on "tcf08ec602afa51cfb8dcd63813c2a2f3"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tcf08ec602afa51cfb8dcd63813c2a2f3"."trg_from_plays", t87f08681444df16bfed2380027858a10.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
